title: T-046 — UI: production dashboard + WO list/detail + Start WO modal w/ release blockers (SCR-08-01/02, MODAL-08-02)
prompt:
# T-046 — Production dashboard + WO list/detail + Start WO modal UI

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-01, SCR-08-02, MODAL-08-02, §1.1A (release blocker contract)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/dashboard.jsx:3-146 (production_dashboard), :149-229 (line_card); production/wo-list.jsx:3-104 (wo_list); production/wo-detail.jsx:3-87 (wo_detail); production/modals.jsx:10-29 (start_wo_modal)

## Goal
Build the Server Component pages for SCR-08-01 dashboard, the WO list (SCR-08-02 entry), the WO detail header/tab shell, and the MODAL-08-02 Start WO Dialog rendering canonical release blockers from T-001. Every visible Production Release WO action is removed; blocked WOs are shown read-only with a Planning deep-link.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/production/page.tsx (RSC) — production_dashboard parity: KPI row (6 Suspense tiles), attention ribbon, LineCard grid, recent events feed, quick-actions panel; SWR refresh 30s.
2. apps/web/app/production/wos/page.tsx (RSC) — wo_list parity: status tabs with counts (GROUP BY status), search + line + period filter via URL params, shadcn Table with progress bar per row, allergen-gate badge, blocked-row Start disabled + Planning deep-link.
3. apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/page.tsx (RSC) — wo_detail header (status badge, dual progress bars), over-consumption alert banner, tab shell stub for consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history (tabs filled by T-047), action button group (Pause/Waste/Catch-weight/Complete) gated by status.
4. apps/web/components/production/start-wo-modal.tsx ('use client') — shadcn Dialog rendering `release_status`, `active_bom_header_id`, `active_factory_spec_id`, and typed `release_blockers` from `assertFactoryReleaseRuntimeAdmitted` (T-001); disabled when blocked with `[Open in Planning]` deep-link; PIN sign-off only enabled when admitted.
5. Literal `data-prototype-label` markers attached: `production_dashboard`, `line_card`, `wo_list`, `wo_detail`, `start_wo_modal`. All copy via next-intl keys.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production pages render, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/dashboard.jsx:3-229, wo-list.jsx:3-104, wo-detail.jsx:3-87, modals.jsx:10-29, then 6 KPI tiles + LineCard grid + WO list status tabs + WO detail header + Start WO Dialog match the prototype layout 1:1 — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + visible `data-prototype-label` markers.
2. Given a WO whose canonical release status returns `release_blockers`, when the WO list row and Start WO modal are rendered, then Start is disabled, blockers list shows typed reasons, and a `[Open in Planning]` deep-link to the Planning release queue is present.
3. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (or documented blocker with RTL/snapshot fallback) and confirms no Production Release WO control is visible anywhere.

## Test strategy
- RED: apps/web/app/production/__tests__/dashboard-and-wo-list.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/start-wo-modal.test.tsx asserting parity (3 surfaces + dialog), data-prototype-label presence, blocked-row Start disabled, Planning deep-link, no Release WO control.
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/production/__tests__/dashboard-and-wo-list.test.tsx apps/web/components/production/__tests__/start-wo-modal.test.tsx`
- For UI parity, capture screenshots + Playwright trace; attach paths in closeout.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not render a `Release WO` action anywhere in Production (modal is deprecated per prototype-index entry `release_wo_modal`).
- Do not infer admission from D365 sync/Built/export or local bom_released flags — read only from T-001's admit result.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives + next-intl keys.
- Do not use HTML <select> for filters; use shadcn Select.

pipeline_inputs.description: RSC dashboard + WO list/detail shell + Start WO Dialog with canonical release blockers; no Release WO action.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity checklist per surface: (a) production_dashboard at prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/dashboard.jsx:3-146 — 6 KPI Suspense tiles + attention ribbon + LineCard grid + recent events feed + quick-actions panel + shift targets; (b) line_card at dashboard.jsx:149-229 with status-conditional sections + operator avatar + Next WO chip + allergen change warning; (c) wo_list at wo-list.jsx:3-104 with status tabs + line/period filters via URL params + Progress bar + allergen-gate badge; (d) wo_detail at wo-detail.jsx:3-87 with dual progress bars + over-consumption banner + tab stub; (e) start_wo_modal at modals.jsx:10-29 wired to T-001 admit/blockers. SWR refreshInterval=30000ms per §7.6 FR-08-E6-005. Status badges via shadcn Badge variants. All copy via next-intl. Literal data-prototype-label markers for QA. UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Do not implement the allergen changeover screen/modal (T-048)
Do not implement analytics screens (T-049, T-050)
Do not implement DLQ admin UI (T-051)
